name: Refactor Bootstrap & Cloudflared
description: Break the 600-line bootstrap.nix monolith into modular, composable files. Deduplicate cloudflared ingress routes into a single shared definition. Fix the K8s cloudflared deployment to route to the correct NodePort (30856, not port 80).
scope: Cloudflared routes → shared config in modules/shared/ or modules/services/

name: Generalize Host Abstraction
description: Make mkClusterHost more flexible with configurable options for master address, node labels, taints, and per-host secret paths. Ensure adding a new host requires minimal boilerplate.

name: Add Real Frontline-01 Host
description: Configure frontline-01 with real hardware specs, wire it as a K8s worker node, generate per-host secrets, and verify it joins the cluster. Consider cloudflared split between hosts.

name: True GitOps CI/CD
description: Establish full GitOps pipeline: push to main triggers CI build + test, then CD auto-deploys NixOS configs and K8s bootstrap manifests. Automate versioning with git-cliff. Ensure multi-host deploy, sops secret handling, and ArgoCD sync.
scope: ArgoCD sync policy for K8s apps
